title: palicourea yneziae
intro: Palicourea yneziae, also known as Ynez's palicourea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub-like plant native to Mexico and Central America, traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antimalarial properties, which contribute to its various health benefits, including the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. Palicourea yneziae can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to make poultices and creams for topical applications.
